page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn8t.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture bare-metal instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 6462C processors running at 3.3 GHz. The system is configured with a single thread per core, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance integrates eight NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs, delivering a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 170 Gbps to support high-throughput data transfers. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options.

Given the high density of dedicated CPU cores, substantial memory capacity, and eight hardware accelerators, this server is designed for GPU-accelerated workloads such as machine learning training, large-scale AI inference, and complex parallel computing tasks. The absence of local storage and hyperthreading represents a specific architectural tradeoff, prioritizing dedicated physical core execution and high-speed network connectivity. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the resource density of this instance makes it suitable for enterprise-grade parallel processing where dedicated hardware access is required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn8t.32xlarge is an x86_64 bare-metal server configured with 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 6462C physical cores operating at 3.3 GHz with a single thread per core. It features 1024.0 GB of system memory and integrates eight NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs providing a total of 192 GB of VRAM. The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 170 Gbps but does not include local storage. This hardware profile is optimized for parallel processing, machine learning, and high-performance computing workloads that require dedicated physical execution resources and high-speed network throughput.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn8t.32xlarge is a bare-metal server with 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 1024 GB RAM, eight NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs with 192 GB VRAM, and 170 Gbps network bandwidth.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn8t.32xlarge features 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 1024 GB RAM, 8 NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs, and 170 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated bare-metal platform featuring eight hardware accelerators and high-speed networking for intensive parallel computing and machine learning workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores with single-thread execution
Eight NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs with 192 GB total VRAM
1024.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
170 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Zero local storage requiring network-attached storage configurations
Optimized for machine learning, parallel computing, and AI inference
